entity_types.ingredient: Any food item, liquid, or seasoning used in the recipe (e.g., chicken, flour, olive oil, salt, garlic)
entity_types.tool: Any cooking implement, vessel, or appliance (e.g., pan, oven, whisk, bowl, wok)
entity_types.action: A cooking verb in its base form (e.g., boil, fry, mix, season, bake)
entity_types.attribute: A property or state describing an ingredient or dish (e.g., golden brown, chopped, hot, fresh)

relation_types.uses_ingredient: action -> ingredient (the action is performed on this ingredient)
relation_types.uses_tool: action -> tool (the action is performed using this tool)
relation_types.has_attribute: ingredient -> attribute (the ingredient has this state/property)
relation_types.follows: action -> action (the second action follows the first temporally)

entity_types.person: A human subject (e.g., man, woman, child, group, athlete)
entity_types.object: Any physical object, instrument, vehicle, or thing (e.g., piano, ball, car, dog)
entity_types.setting: A location or scene type (e.g., stage, beach, gym, classroom, street)
entity_types.action: An activity verb in its base form (e.g., play, run, talk, hold, skate)
entity_types.attribute: A property describing a person, object, or setting (e.g., black, sunny, large)

relation_types.performs: person -> action (the person is doing the action)
relation_types.uses_object: action -> object (the action involves this object)
relation_types.located_in: person | action -> setting (occurs in this setting)

extraction_rules.literal_only: Extract ONLY entities and relations explicitly stated in the summary text. Do NOT infer or add commonsense knowledge.
extraction_rules.preserve_form: Preserve the surface form of malformed or unusual tokens (e.g., 'verdalago', 'garala') as-is. Do not normalize to a likely intended word. Mark them with 'malformed: true'.
extraction_rules.no_repetition: If the same entity appears multiple times in a summary, extract it ONCE as a single entity.
extraction_rules.lowercase: Normalize entity surface forms to lowercase.
extraction_rules.empty_ok: If the summary is degenerate or contains no extractable entities, return an empty entities/triples list with reason 'degenerate'.
